title: Russian Cabbage Salad
description: A classic Russian salad with the added twist of chewy texture. This salad is perfect for a light and refreshing snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the shredded cabbage and chopped lettuce (if using).
In a separate bowl, mix together the Russian salad and chopped scallions (if using).
Pour the chewy Russian salad dressing over the cabbage mixture and toss to combine.
Add the Russian salad mixture and toss gently to combine.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
